understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate each level’s grid to complete all goal cells. A goal cell only completes when I step onto it while carrying a piece whose shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal’s required attributes. After completing every goal in the level, I advance to the next level; completing all levels wins, while running out of lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0, I lose 1 life and stamina resets to its maximum. Walls block movement, and the state provides a list of blocked_directions that must never be chosen because they waste a turn/stamina with no movement. Stepping on modifier tiles changes the carried piece: shape modifier cycles shape 0–5 (wrapping), color modifier cycles colors in order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise through 0° → 90° → 180° → 270° → 0°. A goal activates only when shape+color+rotation all match simultaneously; then stepping onto that goal completes it. Efficient routing matters due to limited turns/stamina, and if a desired direction is blocked, I should reroute via perpendicular moves rather than retrying blocked moves.

history.summary: Turn budget (100) exhausted.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate each level’s grid to complete all goal cells. A goal cell only completes when I step onto it while carrying a piece whose shape, color, and rotation exactly match that goal’s required attributes. After completing every goal in the level, I advance to the next level; completing all levels wins, while running out of lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0, I lose 1 life and stamina resets to its maximum. Walls block movement, and the state provides a list of blocked_directions that must never be chosen because they waste a turn/stamina with no movement. Stepping on modifier tiles changes the carried piece: shape modifier cycles shape 0–5 (wrapping), color modifier cycles colors in order orange → blue → green → red → orange, and rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise through 0° → 90° → 180° → 270° → 0°. A goal activates only when shape+color+rotation all match simultaneously; then stepping onto that goal completes it. Efficient routing matters due to limited turns/stamina, and if a desired direction is blocked, I should reroute via perpendicular moves rather than retrying blocked moves.
